rules.title: High impressions but low CTR
rules.insight: This page or query is getting strong visibility but not enough clicks.
rules.why_it_matters: Search demand exists, but the search result is not compelling enough to drive traffic.
rules.recommendation: Improve title tags, meta descriptions, and intent alignment to increase click-through rate.

rules.title: Strong ranking but low CTR
rules.insight: The page ranks well but is not attracting clicks.
rules.why_it_matters: High rankings without clicks represent missed traffic opportunities.
rules.recommendation: Test new titles and descriptions that better match user intent and improve click appeal.

rules.title: High traffic but low engagement rate
rules.insight: This page is attracting traffic, but visitors are not engaging meaningfully.
rules.why_it_matters: When traffic is present but engagement is weak, the page may not match expectations or may have UX/content issues.
rules.recommendation: Improve the headline, intro, page structure, and next-step clarity to better align with user intent.

rules.title: High engagement rate but low conversion
rules.insight: Visitors are engaging with the page, but they are not converting.
rules.why_it_matters: Interest exists, but something in the conversion path is blocking users from taking action.
rules.recommendation: Reduce friction, strengthen CTA placement and clarity, and review whether the offer and next step are obvious.

rules.title: Below-target engagement rate opportunity
rules.insight: This page’s engagement rate is weaker than the desired level.
rules.why_it_matters: A weaker engagement rate can indicate that the content, page experience, or next-step pathway is not resonating strongly enough.
rules.recommendation: Review the page for content relevance, readability, visual structure, and stronger internal actions or CTAs.

rules.title: Needs answer-first structure
rules.insight: The content may be discoverable, but it is not yet structured clearly enough for strong answer extraction.
rules.why_it_matters: AEO performance depends on answerability: clear question-based sections, concise direct answers, and structured supporting detail that answer engines can lift confidently.
rules.recommendation: Rewrite key sections using Question → Immediate Answer → Supporting Detail → Example → CTA.

rules.title: Needs FAQ and schema support
rules.insight: The topic has visibility, but it likely needs clearer FAQ support and answer-engine formatting to improve extraction readiness.
rules.why_it_matters: FAQ sections, question-based H2/H3s, concise direct answers, and relevant schema help content become more featured-snippet and AI Overview ready.
rules.recommendation: Add FAQ sections, question-based headings, and relevant schema to improve answer extraction.

rules.title: Entity consistency opportunity
rules.insight: Users are reaching the site, but the brand may not yet be reinforced strongly enough as a consistent, trusted entity across the web.
rules.why_it_matters: GEO depends on citability and trust: consistent entity descriptions, provider/location signals, GBP alignment, directories, reviews, and brand mentions all improve AI recommendation readiness.
rules.recommendation: Standardize brand, service, location, provider, and organization descriptions across website, GBP, directories, and social profiles.

rules.title: AI citation authority opportunity
rules.insight: The topic has discoverability, but it may lack the authority and quotable signal strength needed for AI citation and recommendation systems.
rules.why_it_matters: GEO is strengthened by brand authority, quotable insights, external citations, reviews, PR, YouTube, Reddit/forums, podcasts, and other third-party trust signals that help AI systems decide what to cite.
rules.recommendation: Add quotable insights, expert statements, citations, reviews, and external authority signals to improve AI citation potential.

rules.title: High reach but low engagement
rules.insight: Content is reaching users but not driving interaction.
rules.why_it_matters: Low engagement limits growth and algorithm performance.
rules.recommendation: Improve hooks, content value, and first impressions to increase engagement.
